title: Hunger Bar Upside Down - Apple Skin Addon
description: Turning your hunger bar into a silly, disorienting display! 让饥饿条变得滑稽又违和！
body:
**Resource Pack Description: Upside-Down Hunger – A Fun Visual Flip**  

Tired of the same old hunger bar in vanilla Minecraft? Try this playful **"Upside-Down Hunger" resource pack**! We’ve flipped the classic ham icon upside down, turning your hunger bar into a silly, disorienting display—as if Steve suddenly forgot how food works, or gravity in your world went haywire!  

### ✨ **Features**  
- **Flipped Icon**: Keeps the original hunger bar design but inverts the ham icon for a subtle yet amusing twist.  
- **Lightweight**: Only modifies UI textures, ensuring compatibility with most versions and no impact on performance.  
- **Troll Your Friends**: Use it in multiplayer and see how long it takes for others to notice something’s "off"...  

### � **Perfect For**  
- Pranking friends on survival servers  
- Refreshing tiny visual details  
- Testing who’s the most observant Minecraft player  

**Note**: This resource package is an unofficial add-on package and has no direct connection with AppleSkin mod.  

---  
*"When you view hunger upside-down, maybe food tastes better… or worse?"*  

**Download and drop into your resource pack folder to enjoy this topsy-turvy twist!**

---

**资源包介绍：颠倒饥饿 - 趣味视觉翻转模组**  

厌倦了原版Minecraft中千篇一律的饥饿值显示？试试这款恶搞风格的 **「颠倒饥饿」资源包** 吧！我们将传统的火腿图标上下翻转，让饥饿条以一种滑稽又违和的方式呈现——仿佛你的史蒂夫突然失去了对食物的正常认知，或者你的世界重力突然失控！  

### ✨ **特色**  
- **经典图标翻转**：保留原版饥饿条设计，仅将火腿图标倒置，简单却充满恶趣味。  
- **轻量无负担**：仅修改UI纹理，兼容绝大多数版本，不影响性能或其他游戏内容。  
- **迷惑你的朋友**：在多人游戏中悄悄使用，看他们何时会发现“哪里不对劲”……  

### � **适用场景**  
- 整蛊好友的生存服务器  
- 追求细节变化的视觉翻新  
- 测试谁才是真正的“MC细节党”  

**注意**：本资源包非官方附加包，与AppleSkin模组无直接联系  

---  
*“当你倒着看饥饿条，或许食物也会变得更好吃？”*  

**下载并放入资源包文件夹，即刻体验这场微妙的颠倒盛宴吧！**
